title: Uncraftables Datapack
description: Makes things in Minecraft that are unable to be crafted, craftable
body: See GitHub for more info ## Recipes (A-Z) - Bell - Chainmail Armour Set - Coral Blocks - Coral Items - Dirt - Elytra - Experience Bottle - Fish - Gilded Blackstone - Horse Armors - Name Tag - Reinforced Deepslate - Saddle - Spawn Eggs - Spawner - Totem of Undying - Trident - Wither Rose All recipes are unlocked when completeing the `[Minecraft]` advancement
